header.title: User Management
header.description: View and manage user accounts and their assigned roles.

empty.title: No users found
empty.description: Create your first user to get started.

errors.tryAgain: Please refresh the page and try again.

noPermission.title: You don't have permission to view users
noPermission.description: You can still create new users using the button above.

formDialog.createdDescriptionSuffix: has been created. Share the temporary password below — the user will be asked to change it on first login.
formDialog.passwordNotShownAgain: This password will not be shown again. Make sure to copy it now.
formDialog.editDescription: Update the user's display name and role assignment.
formDialog.createDescription: A secure temporary password will be generated automatically. The user will be required to change it on first login.

errors.userNotFound: User not found. They may have already been deleted.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to perform this action.

header.title: Global Roles
header.description: Manage system-wide roles and the permissions they grant to users.

empty.title: No roles defined yet
empty.description: Create your first role to start managing user permissions.

errors.tryAgain: Please refresh the page and try again.

noPermission.title: You don't have permission to view roles
noPermission.description: You can still create new roles using the button above.

formDialog.editDescription: Update the role name and its permission grants.
formDialog.createDescription: Define a new system-wide role and configure its permissions.

errors.nameTaken: A role with this name already exists.
errors.nameInvalid: Role name must be uppercase letters, numbers, and underscores only.
errors.roleNotFound: This role no longer exists. It may have already been deleted.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to perform this action.
errors.internalError: Something went wrong on the server. Please try again.

deleteDialog.title: Delete role
deleteDialog.confirmTextPrefix: Are you sure you want to delete
deleteDialog.confirmTextSuffix: ? This will also remove all user assignments for this role.

errors.hasUsersWarning: This role cannot be deleted because it is still assigned to one or more users.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to delete this role.
errors.internalError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

globalRolesWrite.label: Write Global Roles
globalRolesWrite.description: Create and update global role definitions

projectsRead.label: Read All Projects
projectsRead.description: View all projects in the workspace

projectMembersWrite.label: Write Project Members
projectMembersWrite.description: Add, remove, and update members in any project

projectRolesRead.label: Read Project Roles
projectRolesRead.description: View roles defined in any project

projectRolesWrite.label: Write Project Roles
projectRolesWrite.description: Create and update roles in any project

plugins.title: Plugin Settings
plugins.description: Manage system-wide plugin panel ordering and visibility for all users.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.description: Install or uninstall plugins from the public paca-plugins catalog.

layout.title: Extension Point Layout
layout.description: Drag to reorder plugin panels within each extension point. Toggle visibility to show or hide panels for all users.
